title: 'They are striking everywhere' - Paramedics in Lebanon speak to BBC after Israeli strikes
summary_full: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
summary_public: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
